title: Set App LED
description: Sets the reader APP LED to the specified color

command.description: The value for the key command must be set_appled

command_id.description: A unique ID that will be echoed back in the command response by the reader.

payload.title: set_appled
payload.description: Sets the reader App LED to the specified color and behavior.

color.description: LED color to apply. Allowed values: red, amber, green, off.

seconds.description: Duration in seconds for the LED state to remain active.

flash.description: Whether the LED should flash while the state is active.
